title: crepidium khasianum
intro: Crepidium khasianum, also known as the Khasi crepidium, is a type of orchid species native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Crepidium khasianum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or ointments to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
